title: Egyptian-Style Velvety Onion Fritters
description: Crispy fried onion fritters inspired by Egyptian street food, with a tangy and velvety twist.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine chopped onion and spices.
In a separate bowl, whisk together tahini, lemon juice, and olive oil.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix well.
Heat a non-stick pan with a thin layer of oil.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the mixture into the pan and flatten slightly.
Fry the fritters until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
